data.title: A Prospective, Randomized, Double-Blind, Placebo-Controlled, Single-Center Study of the Intradermal Injection of rHuPH20 or Placebo in Subjects With Nickel Allergic Contact Dermatitis
data.brief_summary: The purpose of this study is to compare the effect and safety of rHuPH20 or placebo for the prevention and treatment of skin allergic reaction to nickel. The study drug and placebo will be administered by intradermal injection.
data.eligibility_criteria:
Inclusion Criteria:

* Females 18-60 years of age. Females of child-bearing potential must use a standard and effective means of birth control for the duration of the study.
* Known contact dermatitis to nickel with a confirmed positive patch-test result to nickel sulfate.
* Intact normal skin witho
endpoints: Number of Participants With Positive Reaction Scores Based Upon ICDRG Scoring Scale: Regimen 1
Number of Participants With Positive Reaction Scores Based Upon ICDRG Scoring Scale: Regimen 2
